message:
fix(validate,curate): Align with updated ValidationResult schema

validate.ts:
- Add explicit supportingEvidence/contradictingEvidence arrays to gate results
- Map LLM's REFINE verdict to ACCEPT_WITH_CAUTION for type compatibility
- Convert evidence format from ValidatorResult to ValidationResult structure
- Extract supporting vs contradicting evidence based on 'supports' flag

curate.ts:
- Add required 'reason' field to InversionReport when creating anti-patterns
- Reason captures context: "Marked as toxic/anti-pattern"

These changes ensure proper type alignment between:
- ValidatorResult (internal LLM response format)
- ValidationResult (public API type used by curate pipeline)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
